criteria.name: conversion hygiene
criteria.description: Scores conversion hygiene for Ecommerce Quality.

scoring.1: Missing or actively harmful; blocks delivery when blocking is true.
scoring.2: Present but incomplete, vague, or weakly evidenced.
scoring.3: Acceptable baseline with clear evidence and minor gaps.
scoring.4: Strong, specific, validated, and ready for normal delivery.
scoring.5: Exceptional, deeply evidenced, reusable, and operator-ready.
